HeroBanner.name: Davit Lursmanashvili
HeroBanner.intro2: a passionate software developer specializing in crafting high-quality web experiences.
HeroBanner.intro3: I also just like to build useful stuff.

SkillsSection.title: Three working lanes, one product mindset.

frontend.title: Build Interfaces
frontend.description: Product UI, responsive implementation, and design-aware front-end delivery.

data.title: Connect State & Services
data.description: State management, data fetching, and back-end foundations that keep products cohesive.

delivery.title: Ship With Reliable Tooling
delivery.description: Platforms, workflows, and language coverage that support delivery and collaboration.

ExperienceSection.title: Selected product work, arranged as stories you can open.

energyGrip.title: EnergyGrip - Energy Management System
energyGrip.subtitle: B2B energy management dashboard with heavy IoT integration and real-time analytics.
energyGrip.description: Led the migration of the legacy Next.js codebase to the modern App Router, significantly boosting performance and developer velocity. Architected complex front-end logic to ensure 100% data availability for real-time telemetry during network drops, while building out advanced data visualizations and bi-directional controls for IoT hardware like thermostats and heat delivery sets.

energyFlip.title: EnergyFlip - Multi-platform Energy App
energyFlip.subtitle: Cross-platform B2C/B2B2C energy monitoring application.
energyFlip.description: Owned the end-to-end redesign of the platform, refactoring over 25,000 lines of code and pushing it to deployment in a massive three-week sprint despite shifting client specs. Managed the entire front-end architecture, designed the UI in Figma, and maintained the CI/CD pipelines to deploy across iOS, Android, and web simultaneously.

consultancyWork.title: Agency Consultancy - High-Profile Clients
consultancyWork.subtitle: Scalable web applications and performance optimizations for major Dutch brands.
consultancyWork.description: Delivered fast-paced, high-quality releases for enterprise clients including DPD, PON, and Nationale Nederlanden. Focused heavily on modernizing legacy codebases, squeezing out performance optimizations, and integrating headless CMS solutions into modern React environments.

universalTransit.title: Universal Transit - Logistics Dispatch
universalTransit.subtitle: Real-time tracking and route planning platform for trucking dispatchers.
universalTransit.description: Acted as the sole front-end engineer building the entire logistics dispatch platform from scratch. Handled everything from mapping out the initial technical specifications for the back-end API integrations to architecting the Material UI front-end for real-time vehicle tracking.
